[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010011001 4
1 1011011010 6
2 0110100111 6
3 1100110110 6
4 0001001100 3
5 1101010100 5
6 1000101111 6
7 1010111000 5

12 21 1100101111 7

34 43 0000110111 5
45 54 1000011000 3
56 65 0010100000 2
67 76 1101100100 5
70 07 0110111110 7

02 20 1100110110 6 match 3
13 31 0001001100 3 match 4
24 42 1101010100 5 match 5
35 53 1000101111 6 match 6
46 64 1010111000 5 match 7
57 75 1111000100 5
60 06 1011011010 6 match 1
71 17 0110100111 6 match 2

14 41 0001111011 6
25 52 0101001100 4
